# J3 Cargo Services

> UK to Nigeria shipping specialists offering air freight and sea freight services. Based in Bow, East London. Delivering to all 36 Nigerian states.

## About

J3 Cargo Services is a UK-based cargo and logistics company specialising in shipping goods from the United Kingdom to Nigeria. Founded and operated from 429-431 Wick Lane, Bow, London, J3 Cargo provides door-to-door shipping services covering air freight and sea freight to every state in Nigeria.

## Services

### Air Freight (UK to Nigeria)
- Delivery time: 5-7 working days to Lagos, 7-10 days to other states
- Pricing: £65 flat rate for parcels up to 8kg
- Over 8kg: £6.50 per kg plus £15 handling fee
- Free collection from London addresses
- Real-time shipment tracking
- Customs clearance included (2-day clearing in Nigeria)

### Sea Freight (UK to Nigeria)
- Delivery time: 4-6 weeks
- Options: Full Container Load (FCL) or Less-than-Container Load (LCL)
- Suitable for vehicles, appliances, heavy/bulky items
- Customs clearance included (5-day clearing in Nigeria)
- Competitive rates for large shipments

### Additional Services
- Professional repackaging with reinforced materials (free at London warehouse)
- Customs clearance by licensed Nigerian agents
- Hazardous materials shipping (bespoke pricing)
- Shipping insurance available

## Shipping Routes

- UK to Nigeria (air freight, 5-7 days)
- UK to Nigeria (sea freight, 4-6 weeks)
- China to Nigeria (air freight, 7-10 days)
- China to Nigeria (sea freight, 6-8 weeks)
- USA to Nigeria (air freight, 7-10 days)
- Nigeria to USA (air freight)
- Global bespoke shipping solutions

## Pricing by Nigerian State (per kg, air freight)

Rates vary by state. Examples:
- Lagos: £4.50/kg delivery, £3.50/kg collection
- Abuja (FCT): £5.50/kg delivery, £4.50/kg collection
- Port Harcourt (Rivers): £5.00/kg delivery, £4.00/kg collection
- Kano: £6.50/kg delivery, £5.50/kg collection
- All states have minimum charges between £65-£100

## Fixed-Price Items (Common Shipments)

- Laptop: £45
- Desktop Computer: £65
- 32" TV: £65
- 43" TV: £80
- 55" TV: £120
- 65" TV: £150
- 75" TV: £200
- Small Fridge: £100
- Large Fridge: £150
- Washing Machine: £180
- Cooker: £120
- Microwave: £45
- Generator (small): £100
- Generator (large): £180
- Car Tyres (each): £25
- Bicycle: £80
- Pushchair/Pram: £60

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How long does air freight take to Nigeria?
A: Air freight from the UK to Lagos takes 7-10 working days. For destinations outside Lagos, add an additional 2-3 days.

Q: What is the minimum cargo weight for air freight?
A: The minimum cargo weight is 8kg at a flat rate of £65. For shipments over 8kg, the rate is £6.50 per kg plus a £15 handling fee.

Q: Do you collect parcels from customers?
A: Yes, J3 Cargo provides free cargo collection from London addresses. Outside London, collection fees may apply.

Q: How long does customs clearance take in Nigeria?
A: Air freight clears in 2 days. Container shipments clear in 5 days. Licensed customs agents handle all paperwork.

Q: What items are prohibited from shipping to Nigeria?
A: Prohibited items include used electronics over 5 years old, certain food products, pharmaceuticals without licensing, weapons, and counterfeit goods.

Q: Do you offer shipping insurance?
A: Yes, optional cargo insurance is available. Rates depend on the value and nature of the shipment.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: Bank transfers, card payments, and cash on collection.

Monday to Saturday, standard business hours. Contact via WhatsApp for out-of-hours enquiries.
